problem id: 30ba0cf4
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(6) OR SHR(7)

examples:
  10110110 -> 10101101
  10101011 -> 11101011
  00111011 -> 11001110
  01001010 -> 10010010
  11001001 -> 01110011
  01100110 -> 10011001
  11100010 -> 10111001
  11011000 -> 00110111

query: 10110101
predicted answer: 01101101
